case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LINDSTECH, KRISTIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-04-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-06-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINDSTECH, KRISTIN THE CITY SPOKE WITH SSI AND LEARNED DEFENDANT IS LIKELY TO BE COVERED FOR THE BILLINGS OF PLAINTIFF PLAINTIFF WILL PURSUE THOSE FUNDS PAST DISMISSAL AND MAY RE-FILE IF THE SO NEED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $413.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSTECH, KRISTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-07-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-09-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED 60 DAYS PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-09-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-04-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSTECH, KRISTIN
